{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321121544FA9A585E8D7CFAC3A747\"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7498502566796428057","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错，甜的地方都很甜，虐的地方刚刚好不是特别特别虐，也就哭的打嗝的程度，哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，也就那么回事嘛，有本事再来啊！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745886864,"group_id":"7461668176032451608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最渴望别人同我一起痛苦的死亡 厌蠢症","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2+YJ5hBGUm7RMvnta2Yt75LEQjClrBoOVMmo5j3XG/q","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0ca7f18f19b34b68b3c337a80b5eefa6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776615093\u0026x-signature=ARe6kKwSnvUKgfh3LD3BYW05BjU%3D","user_id":"2650290330544851","user_name":"自c的忠实拥护者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2650290330544851","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7461668176032451608","book_info":{"abstract":"大多是单人篇，就是各种脑洞，啥的都有，可能有影视剧，动漫，也可能有原创，想到啥就写啥，大家也可以说说自己想看的，我也可以试着写写。因为是短篇，所以感情线都是很快的。而且我爱写玛丽苏哈，包ooc的。我都写同人文了，那能不ooc嘛，我又不是原文作者。接受不了就别看了哈，别气着自己。文里的脑洞大多是我自己的激情创造，是我的XP点。当然，如果你能喜欢看那也最好不过了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1098f6338fcabd59b022151fb682337a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"牌不错哟","author_id":"","book_id":"7461668176032451608","book_name":"各种脑洞文","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a0d8f8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538
